parameters.name: contents
parameters.value: =[{"parts":[{"inlineData":{"data":"{{ $binary.data.toString('base64') }}","mimeType":"{{ $binary.mimeType }}"}},{"text":"Extract all text content from this document. Preserve the structure and formatting. Return as clean markdown without any preamble or commentary. Do not include phrases like 'Here is' or 'The text is'."}]}]

parameters.vectorsToLoad: ={{ [{id: $json.id, values: $json.data, metadata: {source_type: 'gdrive_' + $json.folder, gdrive_id: $json.fileId, folder: $json.folder, text: $json.text, chunk_index: $json.chunkIndex, total_chunks: $json.totalChunks, last_modified: new Date().toISOString(), vectorType: 'gdrive'}}] }}
